description: arXiv:2607.12523v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Reliable reinforcement learning (RL) agents must maintain operational integrity amidst sensor malfunctions, dynamic disturbances, and slow environmental shifts. The detection of out-of-distribution conditions is pivotal to determining when an agent's observations, transitions, or trajectory dynamics deviate from the assumptions underpinning its...
author: Emil Mittag, Richard Dazeley, Peter Vamplew
